The Switch features 5 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. One SFP connector serves to transport data via optical fibers. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. It uses Dual Personality ports, notable for including  both the RJ-45 and SFP connector ; however, only one of them can be active at a time.  The switch dimensions are 158 × 100.7 × 25.4mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to control end station priority.
